subsection.heading: Limitations inapplicable
subsection.chapeau: Neither the ownership limitations of this subchapter nor the ownership limitations of any other provision of Federal reclamation law shall apply to lands which receive only a temporary, not to exceed one year, supply of water made possible as a result of—

paragraph.content: an unusually large water supply not otherwise storable for project purposes; or
infrequent and otherwise unmanaged flood flows of short duration.

subsection.heading: Waiver of payment for temporary water supplies

content.p: The Secretary shall have the authority to waive payments for a supply of water described in subsection (a).

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: Federal reclamation law, referred to in subsec. (a), is defined in section 390aa of this title.
